headline: Assessing APA (APA) Valuation After Strong One Year Shareholder Return And Low P/E Multiple
summary: Why APA Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Today APA (APA) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the shares with a year to date return of 28.9%, compared with an 82.4% total return over the past year. For investors, that performance sits alongside full year revenue of US$8.7b and net income of US$1.4b. This provides a snapshot of how the independent energy producer has been converting its global asset base into earnings. See our latest analysis for APA. At a share price of US$32.68,...
